_comment: Thresholds for iOS Simulator Debug perf guard. Metrics: tokensStartMs (Home:refresh:start:tokens timestamp), tokensSpanMs (done-start), functionCallCount (#lines in function_call.log). Values are absolute; trigger when median > threshold (strategy=median).
_baseline_note: Computed from sample sessions perf-mkjvlp2p-clhuxh / perf-mkjvm80g-pt3tzb / perf-mkjvmqit-aam5mm with +10% tolerance.
